name: wasm-vs-ts-warp-bench
description: Reproducible benchmark: Rust/WASM 3D perspective image warp engine vs naive and hand-optimized TypeScript, plus output parity. Companion repo for the article "WASM didn't make my Figma plugin faster. It made it possible."
author: Bohdan Serefaniuk (https://www.bserefaniuk.es)
